title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Carrot, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Carrot?! Even your hair's gone pure white!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that won't happen next time! We've got an ace up our sleeve.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Will show the world its true form!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: The true form of the minks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tonight is a full moon! The enemy's milk girl has turned into

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She's going to fall into the water!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pedro was a citizen of the Phantom City Zou, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Here she comes! Shoot her down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep your wits about you! She's a warrior of you! She's on a completely different level!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
